\vspace{0.4em}
\begin{minipage}{0.98\linewidth}
\footnotesize
\textit{Notes.}
Experiment setup from manifest/config: 4 worlds, 3 paired seeds (101/201/301), 10 agents per world, single steady stage, 7 days, 30-minute logical-clock decision interval.
All LLM psychology switches are enabled, with \texttt{PROTO\_LLM\_PSYCHOLOGY\_MODE=hybrid} and \texttt{PROTO\_LLM\_UNCONTROLLABILITY\_MODE=hybrid}.
All paired QC rows pass (\texttt{qc\_pass}=1).
Wilcoxon p-values in paired stats are 0.25 for nonzero contrasts (small-sample limit at n=3), so Panel B is primarily descriptive about effect direction and magnitude.
\end{minipage}
